Title: Animaniacs
Actors: Jess Harnell, Tress MacNeille, Rob Paulsen
Plot: Animaniacs is reborn: the 2020 reboot of the classic series brings the Warner Brothers and Warner Sister Dot to the world of online-streaming. Keeping the spirit of its quirky predecessor alive, Animaniacs has been brought back for a new generation of animation aficionados.
Country: United States, Philippines, South Korea, Cambodia, Canada
